zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Shenton於1609年3月20日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾卡芙特時，她的父親Reverend John Shenton52歲，母親Margaret Wood29歲。她於1628年11月27日與Benjamin Childe在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1685年在英國藍卡爾達希 列福享年76歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾達希 列福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Shenton于1609年3月20日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾卡芙特时，她的父亲Reverend John Shenton52岁，母亲Margaret Wood29岁。她于1628年11月27日与Benjamin Childe在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1685年在英国藍卡爾達希 列福享年76岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾達希 列福。

nameMeanings.name: Shenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sheinton (Shropshire), Shenton (Leicestershire), or Shavington (Cheshire), recorded as Shenton in 1514. The Shropshire placename probably derives from Old English scēne ‘bright, beautiful’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or perhaps from an Old English personal name Scēna + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Leicestershire place takes its name from the river Sence, itself from Old English scenc ‘drink, draught’, + Old English tūn, while the Cheshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Scēafa + Old English connective -ing- + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Shenton was born on 20 March 1609, in Croft, Leicestershire, England, her father, Reverend John Shenton, was 52 and her mother, Margaret Wood, was 29. She married Benjamin Childe on 27 November 1628, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1685, in Darcy Lever, Lancashire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Darcy Lever, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Shenton est née le 20 mars 1609, à Croft, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Reverend John Shenton, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wood, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Childe le 27 novembre 1628, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1685, à Darcy Lever, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Darcy Lever, Lancashire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Shenton è nata il il 20 marzo 1609 nel Croft, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Reverend John Shenton, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Margaret Wood, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Childe il 27 novembre 1628, nel Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1685, nel Darcy Lever, Lancashire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Darcy Lever, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Shentonが1609年3月20日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアクロフトで生まれた時，父Reverend John Shentonは52歳，母Margaret Woodは29歳であった。1628年11月27日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコテスバチでBenjamin Childeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1685年にイギリスランカシュアイアダルシ レバーで76歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアダルシ レバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Shenton(이)가 1609년 3월 20일 영국 레이스스터실르 크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reverend John Shenton(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Wood(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1628년 11월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 Benjamin Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1685년 영국 랭카실르 더르시 레버에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 더르시 레버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Shenton nasceu em 20 de março de 1609, em Croft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reverend John Shenton, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wood, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Childe em 27 de novembro de 1628, em Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1685, em Darcy Lever, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Darcy Lever, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Shenton родилась 20 марта 1609 г. в местности крофт, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Reverend John Shenton было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wood, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Childe 27 ноября 1628 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1685 г. в местности дарси ливир, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности дарси ливир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Shenton nació el 20 de marzo de 1609, en Croft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reverend John Shenton, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Margaret Wood, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Benjamin Childe el 27 de noviembre de 1628, en Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1685, en Darcy Lever, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Darcy Lever, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
